rows.label: qev070307_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Oh, you aren't Doctor B...
Aaah... Where is he...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070307_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ruin... Despair... The end...
While I wait anxiously for Doctor B,
various words float up and disappear in my mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070307_MSG0004
rows.name:
Aaah... Why did I supply parts to such a
suspicious alien on deferred payment...
Uuugh... Regret... Resignation... Hell...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070307_MSG0005
rows.name:
You saved Doctor B, didn't you...
Thank you so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070307_MSG0006
rows.name:
If he hadn't come back...
I would have ended up quietly disappearing
from this city...[ST:wait ]
